name: create_document_link
description: Generate a shareable session link for a document so a specific recipient can view and sign it without needing an email invitation. Useful for embedding signing experiences in your own application or sharing via chat.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique ID of the document.

parameters.name: recipient
parameters.description: The email address of the recipient who will use this link.

parameters.name: lifetime
parameters.description: Link expiration time in seconds. Default is 3600 (1 hour).
